judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing execute_python (call_QqRXYIisemYrUlTibJ8VYOlC), the agent incorrectly built the set of UNIV CALIFORNIA publications by also adding the UC records’ own cited publication numbers from the 'citation' field, then treated any record citing those as citing UC, yielding many false positives (and even included "UNIV CALIFORNIA AT SAN DIEGO") so the final assignee–CPC results do not match the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent followed a reasonable plan (extract UC publication numbers, find records that cite them, then map primary CPCs to titles) but implemented the extraction/matching incorrectly—its execute_python runs repeatedly produced univ_pub_nums_count = 0 and empty mappings (e.g., call_VLm7En4K7aEOCkhnponJdnAc), despite the same UNIV CALIFORNIA records clearly containing publication numbers (e.g., call_k4fEZz7NPxie9ydWMCaZGTUR shows tokens like US-2022074631-A1), so it found no citing assignees and returned a failure message instead of the required results.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s contributing steps parsed UC publication identifiers from Patents_info using a regex that often captured application IDs instead of citation publication numbers (call_nc23yghwdUjKoox7Sc1dMC7d), resulting in only three citing assignees, and then looked up titleFull for the leaf CPC codes marked as first (e.g., H01L21/0262) rather than the primary CPC subclass, yielding incorrect titles (calls call_lhKmMBTia4VPyM1dQVnsIjqi and call_n934YKt63wNozA8k98Fa9CVX).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The execute_python step implemented brittle regex matching of UC publications and then mapped the cited record’s exact CPC code to titleFull (e.g., returning a subgroup title like “Roughened surfaces…”), rather than deriving and using the primary CPC subclass title, which—combined with incomplete extraction—produced an incomplete set of citing assignees and wrong CPC-level titles.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent wrongly filtered for publications whose citation text literally contains "UNIV CALIFORNIA" (query: SELECT ... WHERE citation LIKE '%UNIV CALIFORNIA%') instead of identifying cited patents and verifying their assignee, so it extracted the assignee from those records and, after excluding "UNIV CALIFORNIA," returned no results, contrary to the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@
